zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolph Duke of Lorraine於1320年出生在法國洛萊時，他的父親Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen38歲，母親Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich35歲。他於1328年與Eleonore von Bar在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒朋吉亞-姆素結婚。他去世於1346年8月26日享年26歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolph Duke of Lorraine于1320年出生在法国洛萊时，他的父亲Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen38岁，母亲Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich35岁。他于1328年与Eleonore von Bar在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒朋吉亞-姆素结婚。他去世于1346年8月26日享年26岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rudolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolph Duke of Lorraine was born in 1320, in Lorraine, France, his father, Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen, was 38 and his mother, Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, was 35. He married Eleonore von Bar in 1328, in Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. He died on 26 August 1346, at the age of 26, and was buried in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolph Duke of Lorraine est né en 1320, à Lorraine, France, son père, Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Eleonore von Bar en 1328, à Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolph Duke of Lorraine 1320 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen 38 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich 35. Er hat 1328 in Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich Eleonore von Bar geheiratet. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 26 Jahren und wurde in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolph Duke of Lorraine è nato il nel 1320 nel Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Eleonore von Bar nel 1328, nel Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Morì il 26 agosto 1346, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolph Duke of Lorraineが1320年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringenは38歳，母Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreichは35歳であった。1328年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルポント-a-モウソンでEleonore von Barと結婚した。彼は1346年8月26日に26歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモンセル-ルeス-ルンeヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rudolph Duke of Lorraine(이)가 1320년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1328년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 폰트-a-모우슨에서 Eleonore von Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 몬셀-e스-루e빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolph Duke of Lorraine nasceu em 1320, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleonore von Bar em 1328, em Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolph Duke of Lorraine родился в 1320 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleonore von Bar в 1328 г. в местности понт-a-муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности монсел-лeс-лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolph Duke of Lorraine nació en 1320, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Eleonore von Bar en 1328, en Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1346, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
